key-trends.title: Key Trends
key-trends.prompt: Which trends are reshaping the field?
examples: Generative AI commoditising basic content production
Tightening data-residency regulation in the EU
Gen Z preferring subscription over ownership

market-forces.title: Market Forces
market-forces.prompt: Who do you serve, and what do they need?
examples: Mid-market segment growing 25% / yr while enterprise stalls
Buyers now expect SOC 2 evidence within the first 30 days
Switching cost dominated by data-migration friction

industry-forces.title: Industry Forces
industry-forces.prompt: Who are you competing with — directly and indirectly?
examples: Two incumbents bundling our feature into their suite
Open-source alternative reaching feature parity in 6 months
Cloud provider raising egress fees — squeezes our margin

macroeconomic-forces.title: Macroeconomic Forces
examples: Capital scarce — bridge round must extend runway 18 months
China engineering talent now 40% of the global pool
USD strength makes our overseas revenue worth less
